case_title: LAN FONG LAU VS. KUN YOI WU

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LAN FONG LAU. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KUN YOI WU. CHESTER NG WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPERTER FOR MR. WU. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,800.00 FILED BY LAU, LAN FONG AS TO DEFENDANT WU, KUN YOI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT WU, KUN YOI
